productDisplayName: Spykar Men Laundered With Affection And Care White T-Shirts
description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has a ribbed neckline with tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, short sleeves, brand tab on the right hemline and grunge look graphic on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak Flat dry Avoid twisting or wringing To maintain shape, fold and stack rather than hang Dry in shade Moderate warm iron Look cool all year long in this white round neck t-shirt from spykar. The grunge look graphic of the spykar jeans adds an edgy vibe to this tee. Team this with jeans and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.
